headline: Dart Language
description: Dart (Google, 2011) is an object-oriented language optimized for client development — primarily Flutter apps. Dart 3 (2023) introduced 100% sound null safety, records, patterns, and class modifiers. Compiles to native ARM/x86 (AOT) for mobile, and JavaScript for web.

citation.name: Modern Cross-Platform Development: Flutter, Dart, and React Native (2025)
citation.author: multiple
